title: mini upgrade a /mini:upgrade
goal: Add a `mini upgrade` terminal command and a `/mini:upgrade` slash command that install the latest mini-orchestrator from npm, plus a non-blocking statusline indicator that shows when a newer version is available on npmjs.com (version cached locally with a TTL, so the status line never blocks on the network).

steps.title: Version-check + cache module
steps.detail: src/upgrade/versionCheck.ts — fetch latest version from the npm registry via built-in fetch, read/write a TTL cache (5h) under the OS temp dir keyed to the package name, semver isNewer comparison, and a refreshCache() helper. Unit tests for isNewer and cache parse/TTL.

steps.title: Statusline upgrade indicator
steps.detail: Extend statusline data + render.ts to append a yellow '↑ <latest>' segment only when a newer version is cached. The statusline command reads cache only and spawns a detached fire-and-forget background refresh when the cache is stale (>5h). Add a hidden 'mini check-version' CLI command that performs the fetch+cache write. Render snapshot/tests.

steps.title: mini upgrade command
steps.detail: src/commands/upgrade.ts + register in cli.ts. Fresh synchronous check, report current → latest, install via 'npm install -g mini-orchestrator@latest'; warn (no-op) on a dev/symlink install; --check (only report) and --yes (skip confirm) flags. Tests for the decision logic.

steps.title: /mini:upgrade slash command
steps.detail: Add to COMMAND_DEFS with a non-interactive body (preview via mini upgrade --check, confirm in chat, apply via mini upgrade --yes). Update the install hint and command count/snapshot tests.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document mini upgrade, /mini:upgrade and the statusline upgrade indicator; add an English CHANGELOG entry for the phase.
